title: Marilyn Monroe
meaning_summary: Marilyn Monroe gives G I R L a second album anchor because it carries the same bright Pharrell production language that keeps Happy connected to pop and fashion-adjacent playlists.
revenue_drivers: Album-halo listening from Happy keeps nearby G I R L tracks discoverable.
Pharrell's producer-performer identity supports catalog replay beyond a single hit.
Bright pop production and playlist-friendly pacing help the song retain long-tail value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models album-halo streaming, Pharrell writer/producer participation, and lower-volume catalog replay relative to Happy.

ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because of Pharrell's writer and producer role
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
